title: Arrow Recycling
description: Recover iron by smelting unwanted arrows.
body:
**Smelt Arrows to Iron Ingots**

Ever ended up with stacks of useless arrows after exploring or mob grinding?
Now you can finally recycle them!

Smelt Arrows to Iron Ingots lets you put arrows into a furnace and turn each one into 1 iron ingot. Simple, balanced, and satisfying.

Perfect for survival players who love getting extra value from their loot.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Features**

🔥 Smelt arrows in any furnace

⚙️ 1 arrow → 1 iron ingot

📦 Works with vanilla mechanics

💡 Great for farms and recycling

Why waste iron when your arrows already have it? 😉

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![blasting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d3b298ec8f7ca362b72f00009b53f86afa047a5.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
